# grill-with-docs

This is a vendored third-party skill adapted for the Swiftfin `.agents/` workflow.

- Original library: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
- Original skill: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/skills/engineering/grill-with-docs/SKILL.md
- Original ADR format: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/skills/engineering/grill-with-docs/ADR-FORMAT.md
- Original context format: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/skills/engineering/grill-with-docs/CONTEXT-FORMAT.md
- License: MIT, https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/LICENSE
- Local license copy: `.agents/vendor/skills/grill-with-docs/LICENSE.md`
- Copyright: 2026 Matt Pocock

Local adaptation:

- ADRs live under `.agents/adr/` instead of `docs/adr/`.
- Glossary terms live in `.agents/CONTEXT.md` instead of root `CONTEXT.md`.
- Swiftfin `Documentation/` remains reserved for manually curated upstream project documentation.
